name: @leandown/core
description: Pluggable Lean 4 code highlighting via the Lean LSP

scripts.build: bun run build:js:node && bun run build:js:browser && bun run build:dts && bun run build:css
scripts.build:js:node: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target node --external @floating-ui/dom --external @libsql/client --external escape-html
scripts.build:js:browser: bun build src/runtime.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target browser --external @floating-ui/dom --external @libsql/client --external escape-html
